title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 491.190 - Fine for nonattendance
text:
491.190.  Fine for nonattendance. — The court shall have power to impose a fine, not exceeding fifty dollars, on every person duly summoned as a witness, who shall not appear and testify; which fine may be remitted, for good cause shown, at the term to which he is summoned, or the next term thereafter.
(RSMo 1939 § 1903) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1739; 1919 § 5426; 1909 § 6370
